scripts.bundle: npm -w verbatim-server run clean && npm -w @verbatim/shared run build && npm -w verbatim-server run build && npm -w verbatim-client run build && cp -r client/dist server/dist/public && rm -rf client/dist
scripts.db:dev:reset: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && npm run db:dev:up
